As the child died in the 9th month, it is clear that the child
expired during the trausition. This accords well with the posi-
tion of Saturn. Even the Moon can be said to be at the fag
end of Uttarabhadrapada. She is in her debilitation Arhsa and
is aspected by powerful Mars. Saturn is in Lagna-bhava and
